title: Crunchy Tomato Tart
description: A flaky pastry crust topped with a tangy tomato filling and a crumbly cheese topping.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough and place it in a tart pan.
In a bowl, mix together the diced tomatoes and sour cream.
Pour the tomato mixture into the pastry crust.
Sprinkle the crumble cheese on top of the tomato mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Let the tart cool for a few minutes before serving.
